TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Gambia u Gambia sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 13 28 N, 16 34 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 11,300 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 10,120 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 1,180 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 2,009,648. kakalukan umah sa 56.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 43.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 0%. caay kau cabayay a kanatal nu Taywan. Gambia tadangangan Gambia kapulungan a kanatal . Gambia u saadidi'ay nu Africa a kanatal, u lala' nuheni mala tulu nu cacayay nu Taywan. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Banjul . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 18 bulad 2 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Adama Barrow, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 1 bulad 19 demiad. kakitidaan Kan-piya (Gambia itida i Fa-cuo (Africa nutipan, nutipan mitepal tu Tasi-ying wayway nu lala masa wali nutipan nu satanayu sananay a enalan, amis,wali, timul u hekal malaup nu Senegal , u kacaledesan nu lutuklutukan a demiad . 240ŚÖ¨ťáĆ,ŚąįťĀĒ"śėÜťô∂Áąĺ"(Kuntaur). pulung nu kanatal i Kanpi-ya "Gambia sauwac nu masatanayuay a enal a lala'", isasa ku lala' masaenal, talakaw han makaala tu sepat a pulu' ~ lima a pulu' a lawat (depah, ŚÖ¨Śįļ). Kanpi-ya (Gambia sauwac makayda tu wali nutipan, pisilsilan nu nanum pasayda i Tasi-yung . macacelcel ku nanum, idaw ku yadahay nu puu'an nananumam mala lanulanuan (katukuhan ku puu'an maenep tu malaanu'), adidi'ay a balunga paimihecaan taneng mililis tu Kanpi-ya (Gambia sauwac katukuh i walian. kaudadan hantu, mukatu nanum nu 5.79 a lawat (depah ŚÖ¨Śįļ) a balungan, midungdung tu sawac tapabaw tu 240 km, katukuh i Kuntaw-el (Kuntal . tademaw . tademaw nu Kanpi-ya (Gambia tusa a lasubu (200) a mang , siwa a bataan a kilac (90%) nu tademaw nisiziaan nuheni han u islam a kiwkay . . duma a tademaw han u kelisetu a kiway . Kapi-ya (Gambia a tademaw misuayaw tina tusaay a kiwkay nu pihibangan, masasungaay namin kunuheni. Kapi-ya (Gambia a binacadan caay kasasu laecus ku nuheni. u binacadan unu udiptu ku kamu atu lisin. iguhan tada kamu nu Kapi-ya (Gambia . u Kanpi-ya (Gambia a tademaw siwa a bataan idaw ku lima a kilac (95%) u Muslim (Mu-Se-Lin Á©ÜśĖĮśěó) a tademaw, sisa u Kapi-ya (Gambia milihida micumud tu iselan kapulungan nu kakaygiyan . . Kapi-ya (Gambia sacaaya kacemulak nu kitakit a kanatal, nu limaay a mihecaan nu wawa mapatay han makaala tu enem a kilacan, pakuyuc kuni kaudipan (tantanengsa ku sakaudip nuheni u saadidiay ku sausi) u tademawan han milakuud tu enemay a kilacan. malaliya, aycepin, AIDS , bala' haykikac a imelang han masaadada nuheni. laylay . Kapi-ya (Gambia naw Ghana Ti-Kuo atu Songhai-Ti-Kuo a niyadu'. . nikilukan nu sasulitan sa, satabalay namakayda i siwaay a se-ci atu cacay a bataan a se-ci nu Arabia misiwbaya a tademaw. Arabia misiwbaya a tademaw patideng milakuud tu "Sahara likelikenan " anipisiwbay a dadan, pacakay tu kalung, u kim atu ngipen nu zu'. sabaw tu lima a se-ci nu Portugal a tademaw debung nuheni ku Gambia , i bayubayuan patideng tu sasiwbayan a dadan. . tawyaay a Gambia u "Mali Ti-Kuo " a kitidaan. 16 . sabaw tu enem a se-ci, United Kindom atu France a tademaw mabulaw makatukuh itida a niyaduan. cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1783) a mihcaan "Funel-say (Versailles " hiyan ku Gambia sauwac a dadipasan malatusa pababenisan sipabeli i United Kindom , Senegal babenisa mala France a lala'. Śú®300 . itida i tulu a lasubu (300) a mihecaan milawit tu Tasi-yung a kalung nu misiwbayan , makaala tu tulu a lasubu a mang 300 ku kalung alan miliyas tina kitidaan. 1965ŚĻī2śúą18śó•, (Dawda Jawara) (Yahya Jammeh) (Dawda Jawara), ". cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1965) a mihcaan tusa a bulad sabaw tu pitu a demiad, Gambia tatengan misiteked, "kuo-fu " co Dawda Jawara matenes kunipikuwan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1994) a mihcaan pituay a bulad, Gambia a gukugung a cong-wey ci Yahya Jammeh palekal tu sasasuada nu hitay, belinen nida ci Cia-Wa-La (Dawda Jawara), patideng tu " hitay a icelang nipilinziyan tu sapikuwan tu wi-yuang-hyei" . 1996ŚĻī9śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku enem a mihcaan siwa a bulat, maala ci Yahya Jammeh mala Cong-tung , tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay (2001) a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulad, tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan siwaay a bulad, tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay a bulat kina tulu matulin mala Cung-tung . 2015ŚĻī12śúą, . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (2015) a mihcaan saba tusa a bulad, Yahya Jammeh mihapu misumad tu ngangan nu kanatal u "Gambia Islamic kapulungan a kanatal " " ", amica atu sakatalawan a kaput u "yi-se-lan-kuo Islamic kanatal The Islamic State)" nai'ku hica , nika u ngangan nu kanatal malecad, sisa itini i kitakit nu siakayan idaw tu kunika sasulawlawan. 2017ŚĻī1śúą29śó•,ÁłĹÁĶĪťėŅťĀĒť¶¨ÔľéŚ∑īÁĺÖ(Adama Barrow) . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu a (2017) a mihcaan cacay a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa a demiad, Cong-tung ci Adama Barrow , sumaded ku ngangan nu kanatal patalumaen naca pala "Gambia kapulungan a kanatal han. kanatalay nikalalacalan a malcabay . Kapi-ya (Gambia Taywan atu China a nikalecabay, mahicay kya kuni kalecaay. 1968ŚĻī1śúą,ÁĒėśĮĒšļěŤąáŚŹįÁĀ£ŚĽļšļ§. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan cacay a bulad, Kapi-ya (Gambia atu Taywan masasungaay kuni kalecaby. 1974ŚĻī12 . cacay a malebau siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1974) a mihcaan sabaw tu tusa a bulad maputung kuni kalecabayan, Kapi-ya (Gambia atu China malecabay. 1995ŚĻī7śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a lasubu idaw ku lima (1995) a mihcaan pitu a bulad, Kapi-ya atu Taywan mutikuaca malecabay. maputung kuni kalecabay tu cuokuo . 2013ŚĻī11śúą, . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) a mihcaan sabaw tu cacay a bulad, Kapi-ya atu Taywan maputun naca kuni kalecabay, 2016ŚĻī3śúą, (Yahya Jammeh). tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku enem (2016) a mihecaan tulu a bulad, Kapi-ya atu China malecabay yaca. sabelibelih' sa kunikalecabay, uidakuhan mangalay mikuwan tu tusa a bataan a apina nu mihecaan ci Yehay.ciame (Yahya Jammeh (Yahya Jammeh) . hatidaay nutenes, u idaw tu kunipipadang nu O-mun (European Union tu Kapi-ya , nika ci Yahya Jammeh cen-fu midebung palula'cus tu tadecaw, yadah ku cumin. amica ku O-mun (European Union miyukiw tu sakakapah, nika Cong-tung ci Yahya Jammeh kaisa misakapah. sisa i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan malingatu, O-mun (European Union putun hatu ku sapipadang tu Gambia an . sakaliyumah makedal ku lala', kalitang ku sakaudip nu langaw nuheni, u kalitang ku yadahay nu kakuliyan, kalitang ku kakakulian nu Kapi-ya (Gambia . . dumasatu u idaw kunipaluma' tu tipus atu kubkub, hatiday nu ahebalay nu lala' pakunida han caay kaluki malatadas. kaliwmahan han itidasa i kaudadan a puu'an a paluma, nipaluma'an tu tuud caay kataneng amaudip, kanca anamaka nutalwan a kanatal pacumud tu kakanen. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA ÁĒėśĮĒšļěśĖ∑šļ§:(( ÁĒėśĮĒšļě:

sakakapańß, nika ¶oŇč-tuŇč ¶i jańßja *amm…ôńß kaisa misakapańß. sisa i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, o-mun (…ôurop…ôan union putun ńßatu ku sapipadaŇč tu gambia dumasatu u idaw kunipar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tipus atu kubkub, ńßatidaj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pakunida ńßan ¶aaj kar~…ĺuki mar~…ĺatadas. kar~…ĺiwmańßan ńßan itidasa i kaudadan a puu Ē~ °an a par~…ĺuma, nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tu tuud ¶aaj katan…ôŇč amaudip, kan ¶a anamaka nutar~…ĺwan a kanatar~…ĺ pa ¶umud tu kakan…ôn. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ¶ia *****:(( ***:
S.FORM: Gambia u Gambia sa i labu nu Africa , itiza i 13 28 N, 16 34 W. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 11,300 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 10,120 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 1,180 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 2,009,648. kakalukan umah sa 56.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 43.90%, zumaay henay umah sa 0%. caay kau cabayay a kanatal nu Taywan. Gambia tadangangan Gambia kapulungan a kanatal . Gambia u saadidi'ay nu Africa a kanatal, u lala' nuheni mala tulu nu cacayay nu Taywan. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Banjul . sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sapadateng nu kanatal demiad sa 18 bulad 2 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Adama Barrow, micakat a demiad sa i 2017 a mihca 1 bulad 19 demiad. kakitidaan Kan-piya (Gambia itida i Fa-cuo (Africa nutipan, nutipan mitepal tu Tasi-ying wayway nu lala masa wali nutipan nu satanayu sananay a enalan, amis,wali, timul u hekal malaup nu Senegal , u kacaledesan nu lutuklutukan a demiad . 240ŚÖ¨ťáĆ,ŚąįťĀĒ"śėÜťô∂Áąĺ"(Kuntaur). pulung nu kanatal i Kanpi-ya "Gambia sauwac nu masatanayuay a enal a lala'", isasa ku lala' masaenal, talakaw han makaala tu sepat a pulu' ~ lima a pulu' a lawat (depah, ŚÖ¨Śįļ). Kanpi-ya (Gambia sauwac makayda tu wali nutipan, pisilsilan nu nanum pasayda i Tasi-yung . macacelcel ku nanum, idaw ku yadahay nu puu'an nananumam mala lanulanuan (katukuhan ku puu'an maenep tu malaanu'), adidi'ay a balunga paimihecaan taneng mililis tu Kanpi-ya (Gambia sauwac katukuh i walian. kaudadan hantu, mukatu nanum nu 5.79 a lawat (depah ŚÖ¨Śįļ) a balungan, midungdung tu sawac tapabaw tu 240 km, katukuh i Kuntaw-el (Kuntal . tademaw . tademaw nu Kanpi-ya (Gambia tusa a lasubu (200) a mang , siwa a bataan a kilac (90%) nu tademaw nisiziaan nuheni han u islam a kiwkay . . duma a tademaw han u kelisetu a kiway . Kapi-ya (Gambia a tademaw misuayaw tina tusaay a kiwkay nu pihibangan, masasungaay namin kunuheni. Kapi-ya (Gambia a binacadan caay kasasu laecus ku nuheni. u binacadan unu udiptu ku kamu atu lisin. iguhan tada kamu nu Kapi-ya (Gambia . u Kanpi-ya (Gambia a tademaw siwa a bataan idaw ku lima a kilac (95%) u Muslim (Mu-Se-Lin Á©ÜśĖĮśěó) a tademaw, sisa u Kapi-ya (Gambia milihida micumud tu iselan kapulungan nu kakaygiyan . . Kapi-ya (Gambia sacaaya kacemulak nu kitakit a kanatal, nu limaay a mihecaan nu wawa mapatay han makaala tu enem a kilacan, pakuyuc kuni kaudipan (tantanengsa ku sakaudip nuheni u saadidiay ku sausi) u tademawan han milakuud tu enemay a kilacan. malaliya, aycepin, AIDS , bala' haykikac a imelang han masaadada nuheni. laylay . Kapi-ya (Gambia naw Ghana Ti-Kuo atu Songhai-Ti-Kuo a niyadu'. . nikilukan nu sasulitan sa, satabalay namakayda i siwaay a se-ci atu cacay a bataan a se-ci nu Arabia misiwbaya a tademaw. Arabia misiwbaya a tademaw patideng milakuud tu "Sahara likelikenan " anipisiwbay a dadan, pacakay tu kalung, u kim atu ngipen nu zu'. sabaw tu lima a se-ci nu Portugal a tademaw debung nuheni ku Gambia , i bayubayuan patideng tu sasiwbayan a dadan. . tawyaay a Gambia u "Mali Ti-Kuo " a kitidaan. 16 . sabaw tu enem a se-ci, United Kindom atu France a tademaw mabulaw makatukuh itida a niyaduan. cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1783) a mihcaan "Funel-say (Versailles " hiyan ku Gambia sauwac a dadipasan malatusa pababenisan sipabeli i United Kindom , Senegal babenisa mala France a lala'. Śú®300 . itida i tulu a lasubu (300) a mihecaan milawit tu Tasi-yung a kalung nu misiwbayan , makaala tu tulu a lasubu a mang 300 ku kalung alan miliyas tina kitidaan. 1965ŚĻī2śúą18śó•, (Dawda Jawara) (Yahya Jammeh) (Dawda Jawara), ". cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1965) a mihcaan tusa a bulad sabaw tu pitu a demiad, Gambia tatengan misiteked, "kuo-fu " co Dawda Jawara matenes kunipikuwan. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1994) a mihcaan pituay a bulad, Gambia a gukugung a cong-wey ci Yahya Jammeh palekal tu sasasuada nu hitay, belinen nida ci Cia-Wa-La (Dawda Jawara), patideng tu " hitay a icelang nipilinziyan tu sapikuwan tu wi-yuang-hyei" . 1996ŚĻī9śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku enem a mihcaan siwa a bulat, maala ci Yahya Jammeh mala Cong-tung , tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay (2001) a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulad, tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan siwaay a bulad, tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (2011) a mihcaan cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay a bulat kina tulu matulin mala Cung-tung . 2015ŚĻī12śúą, . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (2015) a mihcaan saba tusa a bulad, Yahya Jammeh mihapu misumad tu ngangan nu kanatal u "Gambia Islamic kapulungan a kanatal " " ", amica atu sakatalawan a kaput u "yi-se-lan-kuo Islamic kanatal The Islamic State)" nai'ku hica , nika u ngangan nu kanatal malecad, sisa itini i kitakit nu siakayan idaw tu kunika sasulawlawan. 2017ŚĻī1śúą29śó•,ÁłĹÁĶĪťėŅťĀĒť¶¨ÔľéŚ∑īÁĺÖ(Adama Barrow) . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu a (2017) a mihcaan cacay a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa a demiad, Cong-tung ci Adama Barrow , sumaded ku ngangan nu kanatal patalumaen naca pala "Gambia kapulungan a kanatal han. kanatalay nikalalacalan a malcabay . Kapi-ya (Gambia Taywan atu China a nikalecabay, mahicay kya kuni kalecaay. 1968ŚĻī1śúą,ÁĒėśĮĒšļěŤąáŚŹįÁĀ£ŚĽļšļ§. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan cacay a bulad, Kapi-ya (Gambia atu Taywan masasungaay kuni kalecaby. 1974ŚĻī12 . cacay a malebau siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku sepat (1974) a mihcaan sabaw tu tusa a bulad maputung kuni kalecabayan, Kapi-ya (Gambia atu China malecabay. 1995ŚĻī7śúą, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a lasubu idaw ku lima (1995) a mihcaan pitu a bulad, Kapi-ya atu Taywan mutikuaca malecabay. maputung kuni kalecabay tu cuokuo . 2013ŚĻī11śúą, . tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) a mihcaan sabaw tu cacay a bulad, Kapi-ya atu Taywan maputun naca kuni kalecabay, 2016ŚĻī3śúą, (Yahya Jammeh). tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku enem (2016) a mihecaan tulu a bulad, Kapi-ya atu China malecabay yaca. sabelibelih' sa kunikalecabay, uidakuhan mangalay mikuwan tu tusa a bataan a apina nu mihecaan ci Yehay.ciame (Yahya Jammeh (Yahya Jammeh) . hatidaay nutenes, u idaw tu kunipipadang nu O-mun (European Union tu Kapi-ya , nika ci Yahya Jammeh cen-fu midebung palula'cus tu tadecaw, yadah ku cumin. amica ku O-mun (European Union miyukiw tu sakakapah, nika Cong-tung ci Yahya Jammeh kaisa misakapah. sisa i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010) a mihcaan malingatu, O-mun (European Union putun hatu ku sapipadang tu Gambia an . sakaliyumah makedal ku lala', kalitang ku sakaudip nu langaw nuheni, u kalitang ku yadahay nu kakuliyan, kalitang ku kakakulian nu Kapi-ya (Gambia . . dumasatu u idaw kunipaluma' tu tipus atu kubkub, hatiday nu ahebalay nu lala' pakunida han caay kaluki malatadas. kaliwmahan han itidasa i kaudadan a puu'an a paluma, nipaluma'an tu tuud caay kataneng amaudip, kanca anamaka nutalwan a kanatal pacumud tu kakanen. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA ÁĒėśĮĒšļěśĖ∑šļ§:(( ÁĒėśĮĒšļě:

dumasatu u idaw kunipar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu tipus atu kubkub, ńßatidaj nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pakunida ńßan ¶aaj kar~…ĺuki mar~…ĺatadas. kar~…ĺiwmańßan ńßan itidasa i kaudadan a puu Ē~ °an a par~…ĺuma, nipar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tu tuud ¶aaj katan…ôŇč amaudip, kan ¶a anamaka nutar~…ĺwan a kanatar~…ĺ pa ¶umud tu kakan…ôn. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ¶ia *****:(( ***:
